q-component parallel-size-behavior-box { q-property widthValue: "80px" q-property heightValue: "40px" q-bind-css { this.component.widthValue this.component.style.width } q-bind-css { this.component.heightValue this.component.style.height } behavior on widthValue { q-parallel-animation-group { onended { this.component.groupEnded = Number(this.component.groupEnded || 0) + 1; } q-property-animation { duration: 900 easing: "linear" onstepped { this.component.stepCount = Number(this.component.stepCount || 0) + 1; } } q-property-animation { target: "this.component.heightValue" duration: 900 easing: "linear" from: "40px" to: "112px" } } } style { display: grid; place-items: center; width: 80px; height: 40px; background: #1d4ed8; color: #ffffff; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } text { parallel size } onready { var host = this.component; setTimeout(function changeParallelSize() { host.widthValue = "280px"; }, 80); } } q-component parallel-position-behavior-box { q-property leftValue: "20px" q-property topValue: "320px" q-bind-css { this.component.leftValue this.component.style.left } q-bind-css { this.component.topValue this.component.style.top } behavior on leftValue { q-parallel-animation-group { onended { this.component.groupEnded = Number(this.component.groupEnded || 0) + 1; } q-property-animation { duration: 1000 easing: "ease-in-out" onstepped { this.component.stepCount = Number(this.component.stepCount || 0) + 1; } } q-property-animation { target: "this.component.topValue" duration: 1000 easing: "ease-in-out" from: "320px" to: "480px" } } } style { position: absolute; left: 20px; top: 320px; width: 72px; height: 72px; display: grid; place-items: center; background: #7c3aed; color: #ffffff; border-radius: 999px; font-weight: 800; box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.28); } text { parallel xy } onready { var host = this.component; setTimeout(function changeParallelPosition() { host.leftValue = "520px"; }, 80); } } q-component sequential-size-behavior-box { q-property widthValue: "90px" q-property heightValue: "36px" q-bind-css { this.component.widthValue this.component.style.width } q-bind-css { this.component.heightValue this.component.style.height } behavior on widthValue { q-sequential-animation-group { onended { this.component.groupEnded = Number(this.component.groupEnded || 0) + 1; } q-property-animation { duration: 700 easing: "linear" onstepped { this.component.stepCount = Number(this.component.stepCount || 0) + 1; } } q-property-animation { target: "this.component.heightValue" duration: 700 easing: "linear" from: "36px" to: "104px" } } } style { display: grid; place-items: center; width: 90px; height: 36px; background: #0f766e; color: #ffffff; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } text { sequential size } onready { var host = this.component; setTimeout(function changeSequentialSize() { host.widthValue = "260px"; }, 80); } } q-component sequential-shape-behavior-box { q-property opacityValue: 0.25 q-property radiusValue: "0px" q-bind-css { this.component.opacityValue this.component.style.opacity } q-bind-css { this.component.radiusValue this.component.style.borderRadius } behavior on opacityValue { q-sequential-animation-group { onended { this.component.groupEnded = Number(this.component.groupEnded || 0) + 1; } q-property-animation { duration: 700 easing: "linear" onstepped { this.component.stepCount = Number(this.component.stepCount || 0) + 1; } } q-property-animation { target: "this.component.radiusValue" duration: 700 easing: "ease-in-out" from: "0px" to: "42px" } } } style { display: grid; place-items: center; width: 170px; height: 54px; background: #d97706; color: #ffffff; opacity: 0.25; border-radius: 0px; font-weight: 800; } text { sequential shape } onready { var host = this.component; setTimeout(function changeSequentialShape() { host.opacityValue = 1; }, 80); } } section.behavior-animation-group-stage { style { position: relative; min-height: 100vh; overflow: hidden; padding: 1.25rem; box-sizing: border-box; } header { style { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 48rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; } h1 { text { behavior animation groups } } p { style { color: #cbd5e1; line-height: 1.5; } text { Four behavior-driven animation group cases exercise parallel, sequential, alternate target, and per-step hook behavior. } } } parallel-size-behavior-box parallelSizeBox { } sequential-size-behavior-box sequentialSizeBox { } sequential-shape-behavior-box sequentialShapeBox { } parallel-position-behavior-box parallelPositionBox { } }
